actualOutcome: Successfully recovered and rebuilt Pane IDE after deletion bug disaster. Created hybrid TypeScript development environment: pre-compiled backend with FIXED deletion bug + TypeScript React frontend with React Ace editor. Fixed multiple issues: Tailwind v4 configuration, preload script path, chokidar file watcher EMFILE errors. Application now running with properly styled UI.

data.description: Pane application successfully running with proper UI styling
data.final_fixes: Tailwind v4 Vite plugin configured, preload.mjs path fixed, chokidar polling mode enabled
data.status: Window appears with properly styled UI
